description: Visual fixes for the portfolio page

userStories.title: Fix card thumbnail images not filling their container
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want card images to fully cover their thumbnail area so the portfolio looks polished.
acceptanceCriteria: Update `.card-thumb img` rule to use `position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block`
Images fill the full 4:3 area with no empty space or letterboxing
userStories.notes: The current rule uses height:100% which is unreliable when parent height is derived from aspect-ratio. position:absolute + inset:0 is the correct cross-browser approach.
